routeError.title: This page could not be loaded
routeError.description: Trace kept the app open, but this page hit a rendering error. Retry the page or return home.

drewLaunchNote.title: A special note from Drew
drewLaunchNote.message: I appreciate you for using Trace.

incompatibleRuntime.title: This system is not supported by the bundled backend
incompatibleRuntime.description: Trace opened, but the local Trace Core backend cannot run on this Linux version. Please upgrade to a supported Linux distribution and restart Trace.

incompleteInstallation.title: Trace installation is incomplete
incompleteInstallation.description: This installation is missing required local resources, so Trace Core cannot start. Please download and reinstall the latest Trace. If the issue returns after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined Trace Core.
incompleteInstallation.runtimeComponentDescription: This installation is missing required bundled runtime components, so {{resource}} cannot start. Reinstall the latest Trace package. If it still happens after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined Trace components.

packageArchitectureMismatch.title: Trace package architecture mismatch
packageArchitectureMismatch.description: This Trace package is for {{packageArch}}, but this Mac is {{deviceArch}}. You may have downloaded the wrong package. Please download and install the {{expectedArch}} package.

dataMigration.title: Local data migration failed
dataMigration.description: Trace opened, but Trace Core stopped while initializing local data. Reinstalling Trace may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database migration can be inspected.

localDataRepair.title: Local data repair failed
localDataRepair.description: Trace opened, but Trace Core stopped while repairing local agent cache data. Reinstalling Trace may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database can be inspected.
